title: Mini Mobs
description: Adds new mini variant of mobs that spawn naturally.
body:
# Adds miniature variant of mobs that spawn naturally to your Server!
# For the plugin to work make sure you have java 21+ installed.

# Questions and Answers:
Q: Why plugin does not work on my server?\
A: Make sure you are using server with version 1.20.6 or higher(you can check that using /ver).

Q: My server is version X and plugin is version Y will it work?\
A: As long as server version is not lower than plugin version it should work, if not then let me know in Community server [https://discord.gg/rTYGmfzkkD](https://discord.gg/rTYGmfzkkD) and im gonna update it for you.


Q: How does the plugin work?\
A: After installing the plugin on your server mobs have 5% chance of spawning as miniature version of them, you can change in config how big/small you want them to be.

Q: How can i add more mob variants that spawn as miniature?\
A: In config there is a link that leads you to bukkit javadocs, in there is a list of mobs that you can add to the config by simply adding them like the others are added, or you can remove mobs that are in config by default. Remember that mob names MUST be in capital letters.

Q: I need additional support, where do i get it?\
A: In our Community server [https://discord.gg/rTYGmfzkkD](https://discord.gg/rTYGmfzkkD).
